description_long: This fitness center features a striking geometric exterior with bold, black-and-white striped patterns and angular, modernist forms. The facade includes large glass panels, particularly at the entrance, allowing visibility into the interior and creating an open, inviting atmosphere. The roof is flat with a series of skylights or translucent panels, providing natural light to the interior spaces. The building sits on a patterned base that extends outward, possibly serving as a plaza or entryway. Visible signage and branding are present on the exterior, enhancing its identity as a fitness center. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on sharp lines, transparency, and a visually dynamic surface treatment.
description: A modern fitness center with bold geometric patterns, large glass panels, and a flat roof with skylights, featuring visible signage and a striking contemporary design.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main glass entrance, visible signage, and the dynamic striped pattern across the facade and base.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the angular glass panels and the extended patterned base, with less visibility of the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a mostly solid black wall with minimal glass, and the flat roof with skylights is prominent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals another large glass section and the continuation of the geometric pattern, with less signage visible.
